HGSS.667.0001:
Well, that was a very interesting
battle now, wasn’t it?\f
When I’m fishing here, I sometimes
catch items that people have dropped.\r
If I find anything, I’ll give it to you.\f
Will you give me your
phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.667.0002:
If I snag anything good, I’ll be sure to
let you know.
HGSS.667.0003:
All right... Come back if you have a
change of heart.
HGSS.667.0004:
If I snag an item while I’m fishing,
it’s yours. Trade me numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.667.0005:
Ah! Here it is!\f
Come on!
I caught a Poké Ball!\f
It’s kind of covered with algae and
seaweed. I can’t really tell what kind\r
of Poké Ball it is, but I bet you know!\f
HGSS.667.0006:
Shhh!!!
The POLIWHIRL will run away!\f
Don’t bother calling me, come talk to me
in person, that way we can whisper!
HGSS.667.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s grown impressive!
My fishing skills have improved, too!\f
We beat a wild [0100,000B,0000]...
You know, I have more fun fishing\r
than beating wild Pokémon.\f
All right, later.
HGSS.667.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s grown impressive!
My fishing skills have improved, too!\f
But some time ago, we came this close
to landing a wild [0100,000B,0000].\r
I tell you, it was huge. Believe me.\f
All right, later.
HGSS.667.0009:
I’m fishing on [0104,0003,0000], but
nothing’s biting today.\f
Help me while my time away--come over
for a battle.
HGSS.667.0010:
Sigh...They’re not biting like before on
[0104,0003,0000]...\f
You have to come for a battle!
HGSS.667.0011:
Nah, I haven’t found anything that’s
worth your time.\f
You have to have patience.
HGSS.667.0012:
I snagged an item while fishing.
Come pick it up on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.667.0013:
Don’t you want this item?
Hah? You don’t know where?\f
[0104,0003,0000]...
Just head from Mahogany toward\r
Blackthorn!
